headline: Volunteers are one of the clearest ways Camp Dream GA becomes real for campers
subheadline: Camp Dream GA depends on counselors, junior counselors, medical volunteers, leaders, and supporters who are willing to give time, care, encouragement, and practical help.

sections.title: Counselors
sections.description: Volunteer counselors walk closely with campers through the daily rhythm of Summer Camp.

sections.title: Junior counselors
sections.description: Junior counselors give younger volunteers a meaningful way to serve while learning the culture and rhythm of camp.

sections.title: Medical staff
sections.description: Medical volunteers help make camp safer and more responsive for campers who need closer health support.

faq.question: Can younger volunteers participate?
faq.answer: Yes. Junior counselor roles are part of the volunteer structure and provide an age-appropriate way to serve.

cta.heading: Use the contact page if you want help choosing the right volunteer path.
cta.body: Volunteering is one of the strongest ways to step into the Camp Dream GA mission.
